name: Fried Peanut Butter Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread peanut butter evenly on one side of each slice of bread.
2. Mash the very ripe banana with a fork until smooth.
3. Spread the mashed banana on one slice of bread.
4. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Place the assembled sandwich (bread with peanut butter and banana) in the hot skillet.
6. Cook, turning the heat off when both sides are browned and crispy.
